title: Client books an appointment from service selection through confirmation
description: Verifies a client can choose a service, select an accepting barber, pick a date within 7 days and an available time, and confirm the booking with a visible confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Select a service from the client home list
Click the option to start scheduling
Select a barber who is accepting appointments
Select a date within the next 7 days
Select an available time slot
Confirm the appointment
Verify a booking confirmation is visible

title: Existing client logs in and is routed to client area
description: Verifies an existing client can log in and is routed to the client home area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the client home area

title: Client signs up without invite code and lands in client area
description: Verifies a new user can sign up without an invite code and is redirected into the client area after successful account creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Toggle to Signup mode
Fill in full name with Test Client
Fill in phone with 11999990000
Fill in email field with testclient+{{RAND}}@example.com
Fill in password field with Password123!.
Submit the signup form
Verify the user lands on the client home area

title: User signs up with invite code and lands in professional dashboard
description: Verifies a new user can sign up with an invite code and is redirected into the professional dashboard after successful account creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Toggle to Signup mode
Fill in full name with Test Barber
Fill in phone with 11999991111
Fill in email field with testbarber+{{RAND}}@example.com
Fill in password field with Password123!.
Fill in invite code field with {{INVITE_CODE}}
Submit the signup form
Verify the user lands on the professional dashboard

title: Protected route redirects unauthenticated user to login
description: Verifies that navigating to a protected page without an active session routes the user back to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /client-home
Verify the user is prompted to authenticate on the login page

title: Client books an appointment starting from barber selection
description: Verifies a client can start by selecting a barber, then select a service, date within 7 days, and time slot, and successfully confirm the booking.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Select a barber from the client home list
Click the option to start scheduling
Select a service if not already selected
Select a date within the next 7 days
Select an available time slot
Confirm the appointment
Verify a booking confirmation is visible

title: Session persists after refresh for authenticated user
description: Verifies that after logging in, refreshing the page keeps the user authenticated and in the correct area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Press F5
Verify the user remains in the authenticated area without being sent back to login

title: Professional dashboard loads today’s summary and next client information
description: Verifies a professional can access the dashboard and see today’s appointments summary and the next appointment section populated appropriately.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /professional-dashboard
Verify today’s dashboard summary is displayed
Verify the next appointment section is displayed

title: View schedule by date and conclude an appointment
description: Verifies the barber can view appointments for a selected date, conclude an appointment, and see the updated status reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the professional agenda
Select a different valid date within the allowed date range
Open an appointment detail from the list
Change the appointment status to concluded
Verify the appointment shows the concluded status in the appointment list

title: Professional toggles accepting appointments on the dashboard
description: Verifies a professional can toggle whether they are accepting appointments and the UI reflects the updated availability state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /professional-dashboard
Toggle accepting appointments setting
Verify the availability state indicator updates to match the new setting

title: Cancel an appointment from agenda
description: Verifies the barber can cancel an appointment from its detail view and the appointment list reflects the canceled status.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the professional agenda
Open an appointment detail from the list
Change the appointment status to canceled
Verify the appointment shows the canceled status in the appointment list

title: Professional marks the next appointment as completed
description: Verifies a professional can complete the next appointment via check-in and the appointment status updates in the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /professional-dashboard
Mark the next appointment as completed via the check-in action
Verify the appointment shows an updated completed status in the dashboard

title: Update professional profile and toggle availability
description: Verifies a professional can update profile details, toggle accepting appointments, save, and see the availability state persist after refresh.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the professional profile page
Fill "Pro Test Name" into the full name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Toggle the accepting appointments setting
Save the profile
Refresh the page
Verify the accepting appointments setting reflects the last saved state

title: Create a new service
description: Verifies the barber can create a service with required fields and see it appear in the services list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open services management
Start creating a new service
Fill "Test Service A" into the service name field
Fill "Basic service description" into the service description field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Select a valid duration in the duration field
Save the service
Verify a service named "Test Service A" appears in the services list

title: Edit an existing service
description: Verifies the barber can edit a service and see the updated values reflected in the services list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open services management
Start creating a new service
Fill "Test Service Edit" into the service name field
Fill "Original description" into the service description field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Select a valid duration in the duration field
Save the service
Open the service named "Test Service Edit" from the list
Fill "Test Service Edit Updated" into the service name field
Save the changes
Verify a service named "Test Service Edit Updated" appears in the services list

title: Delete a service
description: Verifies the barber can delete a service and it is removed from the services list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open services management
Start creating a new service
Fill "Test Service Delete" into the service name field
Fill "To be removed" into the service description field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Select a valid duration in the duration field
Save the service
Open the service named "Test Service Delete" from the list
Delete the service
Verify a service named "Test Service Delete" is not shown in the services list

title: Update client profile information
description: Verifies a client can edit their full name and phone, save, and see the updated profile information persisted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the client profile page
Fill "Client Test Name" into the full name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Save the profile
Wait for the profile save to complete
Refresh the page
Verify the full name shows as "Client Test Name" on the profile page

title: Booking cannot be confirmed without selecting a time slot
description: Verifies the booking flow blocks confirmation until a time slot is selected and shows a validation error when attempting to confirm without one.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the option to start scheduling
Select a barber who is accepting appointments
Select a service if not already selected
Select a date within the next 7 days
Attempt to confirm the appointment without selecting a time slot
Verify a time slot validation error is visible

title: Validate required fields when creating a service
description: Verifies the barber cannot save a new service with missing required fields and sees a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open services management
Start creating a new service
Leave the required fields empty
Attempt to save the service
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Login requires password validation
description: Verifies attempting to log in without a password shows a validation error and prevents login.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Toggle to Login mode
Fill in the email field with testuser@example.com
Attempt to submit the login form
Verify a password validation error is visible
